# Scenario Presets (Running Phase Baselines)

Each preset is a fast baseline starter aligned to `docs/benchmarks/canonical-scenarios.md`.

## 1) Soft Portrait Drape (L1)
portrait, chest-up framing, soft blouse, realistic fabric physics, gentle gravity drape, subtle fold hierarchy, natural seam tension, preserve fabric thickness and anti-painted-on realism, studio soft light, 85mm lens, photoreal detail

## 2) Editorial Full-Body Dress (L2)
full-body standing editorial pose, lightweight long dress, gravity-driven draping with coherent fold stacking, realistic tension transitions at waist and shoulders, organic compression near movement zones, seam-guided folds, preserve garment volume and anti-artifact realism, high-fashion lighting, full-frame lens look

## 3) Heavy Denim Streetwear (L2)
urban full-body scene, denim jacket and jeans, heavy material response with deep folds and strong gravity pull, seam-defined stress distribution, realistic compression at elbows and knees, preserve thickness and layered volume, anti-plastic textile detail, natural daylight

## 4) Structured Tailoring (L2)
fashion portrait with tailored blazer and pants, structured fabric stiffness with angular folds and restrained drape, clean seam geometry guiding tension lines, subtle compression at joints, realistic garment thickness, anti-painted-on construction fidelity, controlled studio contrast

## 5) Athletic Stretch Outfit (L3)
dynamic athletic pose, compression top and leggings, anisotropic stretch behavior, directional tension propagation from anchor points, natural compression folds under strain, micro-wrinkle variation, realistic thickness separation from skin, anti-smoothness artifact control, high-detail sports lighting

## 6) Layered Winter Set (L3)
outdoor full-body, shirt sweater coat scarf layering, realistic inter-layer overlap and displacement, contact-driven compression where layers press together, seam and gravity-guided fold hierarchy, preserved volume depth and edge thickness, anti-melted-texture realism, cold ambient lighting

## 7) Sitting Compression Test (L3)
seated pose, mid-weight trousers or skirt, realistic bunching at hips and knees, pressure-driven compression density at seated contact points, seam-constrained fold redirection, preserved garment thickness and volume, anti-fused-clothing realism, natural indoor lighting

## 8) Motion Inertia Walk Cycle (L3)
side-view walking motion, coat or skirt with trailing fabric inertia, delayed movement and directional drag, gravity plus motion-induced fold displacement, realistic tension gradients and compression transitions, material-consistent behavior, anti-artifact cinematic realism

## 9) Major Body Reshape Recovery (L3)
edited anatomy proportions, fitted top with layered lower garment, body-responsive adaptation with redistributed tension and compression, seam-guided force propagation, preserved thickness and physical garment separation, asymmetrical micro-fold breakup, anti-painted-on correction

## 10) Cinematic Hero Shot (L3)
dramatic dynamic hero framing, mixed-material garment system, cinematic fabric realism with gravity, tension, compression, seam behavior, layered depth and micro-wrinkle detail, strong anti-artifact constraints, photoreal yet stylized finish
